name: Hamurana Springs
description: 北岛最深的天然泉水，泉水来自周边高原，在地下旅行70年后从15米深的火山岩中涌出。每小时喷出400万升水——足以每天填满两个奥运会标准游泳池——然后顺流而下汇入罗托鲁瓦湖。泉水温度全年恒定10°C。
descriptionEn: The deepest natural spring in the North Island. Water originates from the surrounding plateau, travelling 70 years underground before rising through 15 metres of volcanic rock. The spring spouts 4 million litres of water per hour - enough to fill two Olympic sized swimming pools each day.
highlights: 北岛最深天然泉水，蓝宝石般清澈
45分钟环线步道穿越加州红木林
多种鸟类栖息地，包括濒危的dabchick
